name: % Calls Agent Declined
definition: % of calls declined by agents

name: Actual & Predicted Conversions
definition: actual conversion,  predicted conversion as per model

name: Actual & Predicted Response
definition: actual response,  predicted reponse as per model

name: AME Ratio
definition: Agent Marketing Efficiency Ratio

name: Average Premium
definition: average premium split across state/customer score

name: Average Premium per Policy
definition: Average premium collected per policy

name: Call Abandonment Rate
definition: % of calls abandoned before being answered

name: Cancellation Rate
definition: % of policies cancelled

name: Cancellation Reason Distribution
definition: Breakdown of reasons for policy cancellations

name: Click-Through Rate (CTR)
definition: % of users who click on an ad or link

name: Contact Rate
definition: % of successful contacts out of total attempts

name: Conversion Rate
definition: % of quotes that result in bound policies

name: Cost Per Click (CPC)
definition: Average cost incurred per ad click

name: Cost Per Conversion
definition: Average cost per successful conversion

name: Cost Per Response
definition: Average cost per campaign response

name: Decline Rate
definition: % of quotes declined by customers

name: Flat Cancellation Rate
definition: % of policies cancelled before coverage begins

name: Gross Written Premium
definition: Total premium written before deductions

name: Impression Share by Competitor
definition: Percentage of total impressions received by a competitor compared to the market total

name: Line of Business (Product Type)
definition: Distribution of policies across insurance product types

name: Loss Ratio for Attractive/Unattractive
definition: Loss ratio for attractive and unattractive segment

name: Mid-Term Cancellation Rate
definition: % of policies cancelled before renewal

name: Missed Call Rate
definition: % of calls missed by agents

name: Net Written Premium
definition: Premium retained after reinsurance deductions

name: No of Mails
definition: Total mails for a direct mail channel

name: No of policies Attractive/Unattractive
definition: No of policies for attractive and unattractive segment

name: Outbound Call Attempts
definition: Number of outbound calls made to prospects

name: Position
definition: Average ad position of a competitor in search results

name: Premium Growth Rate
definition: % increase in premium income over time

name: Quote Rate
definition: % of leads that receive a quote

name: Response Rate
definition: % of users who respond to a campaign

name: Share of Clicks
definition: Percentage of total clicks received by a competitor compared to the market total

name: Share of Spend
definition: Percentage of total advertising spend attributed to a competitor

name: Total Marketing Spend
definition: Total marketing expenditure

name: Transfer Rate
definition: % of calls transferred to another agent or department

name: Underwriting Decline Reason Cluster
definition: Categorized reasons for declined applications

name: Retention Rate
definition: Percentage of customers retained over a period

name: Renewal Rate
definition: Percentage of policies renewed at the end of the term

name: Customer Satisfaction Score (CSAT)
definition: Measures customer satisfaction post-interaction

name: Policy Tenure
definition: Average duration a policy remains active

name: Quote to Bind Ratio
definition: Percentage of quotes that result in bound policies

name: Time to Quote
definition: Average time taken to generate a quote

name: Time to Bind
definition: Time taken from quote to policy binding

name: Underwriting Turnaround Time
definition: Time taken to underwrite a policy

name: Digital Engagement Rate
definition: Measures customer interaction with digital channels

name: Agent Productivity
definition: Policies bound or revenue generated per agent

name: # Endorsements
definition: The total number of policies which underwent recode. Recode refers to data correction/reassignment of an existing insurance policy. For example, address change of policy owner,  reassignment of sales rep etc

name: Loss Ratio Ex-Cat
definition: Measures the base loss ratio of the YTD Incurred Loss Amount (Excluding CAT) to the YTD Earned Premium Amount

name: Quotes
definition: Number of Quotes

name: Automated NBRs
definition: Count of auto-identified new business recodes processed

name: Automated NBRs %
definition:
Percentage of new business recodes completed automatically by the
system,out of all Incentivised new business policies

name: Book Transfer Conversion %
definition: New Business Count divided by Quote Count on a transaction date basis.

name: Book Transfer NB DWP
definition: New Business Effective Direct Written Premium from Book Transfer.

name: Book Transfer Pipeline
definition: New Business approved through Book Transfer but yet not transferred.

name: Calls & Visits
definition: Total Value Added "Proactive and Planned" Agency Interactions - Accounts for both phone calls and agency visits.

name: Cancel Month/Year
definition: Month in which a policy cancellation occurred

name: Cancel Year
definition: Year in which policy cancellations occurred

name: Cancels - Standard Deviation
definition: Variation in Cancels per month

name: Cancels - Three Month Avg
definition: Average Cancellations over the last three months

name: Cancels- Ninety Day Sum
definition:
Total Cancellations over the last 90 days for 
terminated agent

name: Capped Loss
definition: The total potential loss amount limited by a maximum coverage or payout cap

name: Close Ratio
definition: Total policies issued/Total quotations sent

name: Closure
definition: It indicates the conversion of quotes to binds

name: Commisionable Amount
definition: The actual commission earned calculated as a percentage of commissionable premium

name: Commisionable Premium
definition: Premium amount on which agent or broker commissions are calculated

name: Cross Sell Opportunities
definition: Potential preferrable LOBs to Cross Sell

name: Cross Sell Total Rounding Premium Opportunity
definition: Total premium opportunity that would be generated if potential cross sells are done

name: Decline Ratio
definition: Total Quotations Declined/Total Quotations given

name: Developed Binds
definition: Policy bound after additional underwriting, documentation or review steps

name: Direct Written Premium
definition: Total Premium amount for all the policies it has directly written during specific period

name: Earned Premium
definition: Portion of premium earned for coverage already provided

name: Fresh Quotes
definition: Fresh quotes are the newly generated quotes

name: Headroom
definition: Potential Premium opportunity available within an existing broker relationship, representing the gap b/w total market potential and current written premium.

name: Hit Ratio
definition: Percentage of submitted quotes that successfully convert into Issued policies

name: Home Loss Ratio Ex-Cat
definition: Measures the base loss ratio of the YTD Incurred Loss Amount (Excluding CAT) to the YTD Earned Premium Amount for Home line of business.

name: Incentivised NB
definition:
Net Incentivised new business policy count(Auto,Home,
other Lines)

name: Issues
definition: Total policy issues till date

name: Last 'X' days
definition: Policies in force in the last 'X' days
aliases: In-Force Policies Count Last X Days

name: Lead Generated Tool%
definition:
Percentage of automated new business recodes that originated 
from lead generation tools or sources

name: LOB wise DWP
definition: Direct Written Premium for Farm Segment
aliases: Line of Business Direct Written Premium

name: LOB wise NB
definition: New Business Direct Written Premium for Farm Segment

name: Lost Premium
definition: Premium amount lost due to non-renewed policies

name: Manual NBRs
definition: Count of manual new business recodes approved/processes

name: Manual NBRs %
definition: Percentage of new business recodes that required manual intervention,out of all Incentivised new business policies

name: Manual submission 30+ Days
definition: Manual NBR submitted more than 30 days after bind date

name: Middle Market DWP
definition: Direct Written Premium for Middle Market Segment

name: Monoline Policies
definition: Number of policies that only cover one type of insurance (e.g. only auto or only home).

name: Monthly Average Reps Selling
definition: Average number of reps who made sales in the month

name: Monthly Days Selling
definition:
Total number of days in a month that a sales rep
actively sold at least one policy

name: Monthy Policy Cancels
definition: Number of policies cancelled in a month

name: NB Counts
definition: Business that is new to PL or rewrites that are 60 days past their expiration date less of flat cancellations. Captured on an effective date basis.

name: New Agency  Location NB DWP
definition: Total New Business Written Premium of all New  Appointed Location

name: New Appointment Location Count
definition: Total Gross Number of all New Location Appointments.

name: New Business Premium
definition: Premium generated from newly acquired accounts during specific period, excluding renewals

name: New Policy Direct Written Premium
definition: New Business Direct Written Premium  is the aggregation of the total premiums on all new policies written by an insurer from January 1 through the current calendar month in the current calendar year, regardless of which portions have been earned or unearned. It includes all new business premiums written and booked during the accounting period.

name: New Premium
definition: Premium from first-time policies written for new customers

name: Non-Fresh Quotes
definition: Non-fresh quotes include quotes which have been modified/updated from previous interaction, or those that have been carried over from past sales cycles

name: Num Months At Risk
definition: Number of months with significant drop in active policies

name: OT Hrs
definition: Total Overtime Hours

name: OT Hrs Per Policy
definition: The number of policies written while working overtime

name: Overall Policy Correction Rate(%)
definition:
Combined percentage of policies that underwent either manual or automated correction
 automated recoding out of all Incentivised business

name: Overall Policy Direct Written Premium
definition: Direct Written Premium is the total premiums on all policies written by an insurer from January 1 through the current calendar month in the current calendar year, regardless of which portions have been earned or unearned.

name: Penetration
definition: Percentage of potential premium captured by the company out of total market opportunity

name: Policies in Force At Term
definition: Active policies at the time the agent was terminated

name: Policies in Force%
definition: Percentage of recoded policies that are currently active and inforce

name: Policy Count
definition: Total number of policies

name: Policy Count (By type)
definition: Policy production count

name: Policy Inforce (PIF)
definition: Policy Inforce is the sum of all policies currently in active status as of the last day of the most recent complete month.

name: Porperty Quotes  (Product Wise)
definition: Property Quotes H3 (Homeowners Insurance)

name: Proposal
definition: Aggregation of Quotes & Rejects

name: Quote
definition: Quote Count indicates the latest iteration of the Quote Cycle was a valid rate and was not rejected(Even if prior iterations were rejected)

name: Quote Ratio
definition: Percentage/No of Quotes of submissions that results in quotes providing to broker

name: Reject Rate
definition: It indicates the rejection rate of proposals

name: Rejects
definition: Reject Count indicates the latest iteration of the quote cycle was rated and rejected

name: Remaining Policies in Force
definition:
Active policies remaining over sequential months 
after agent exit

name: Renewal Premium
definition: Premium from existing policies renewed for another term with the same insured

name: Retention rate
definition: Retention is percent value of the retained policies at the end of the reporting month matched with the total number of the inforce policies from a year ago.

name: Returning Customer Rate % (Loyalty)
definition:
Percentage of automated new business recodes that were for 
customer who have previosuly held policies with company

name: Scheduled Calls
definition: Total calls and visits planned/conducted

name: Small Commercial DWP
definition: Direct Written Premium for Small Commercial Segment

name: Submission
definition: Total No of requests for quotes received frim Brokers with in a given period

name: Submission Count
definition: Total submissions

name: Telesales %
definition:
Percentage of automated new business recodes that resulted from 
customers directly contacting a representative by phone

name: Top 10% OT
definition: Top 10% of overtime hours per policy

name: Total Policy Count
definition: Aggregated Policy Production Count

name: Uncapped Loss
definition: The total potential loss amount without any upper limit or policy cap

name: Valid Cross Sell %
definition: Percent of cross sell that was done with valid policy numbers.

name: Yield
definition: It indicates the conversion of proposals to binds

name: YTD Monthly Average Reps Selling
definition: Average reps selling each month,year-to-date

name: YTD Monthly Days Selling
definition: Total number of days per month,year-to date,during which a rep made at least one sale

name: YTD Policy Inforce (PIF)
definition: Current PIF on Traditional Gold Agencies – PIF on Traditional Gold Agencies from the beginning of year .

name: % Wallet Share
definition: % Wallet Share for an agent or agency is the percentage of a customer's total insurance premium that is placed through that agent.

name: Achieved Rate vs Expected Rate
definition: Whether implemented pricing matches target indicated rate

name: Average Claim Settlement Time
definition: Claims Efficiency

name: Capital at Risk (CaR)
definition: Risk Measurement

name: Claim Settlement Ratio (CSR)
definition: Claims Performance

name: Claims Frequency
definition: Claims Risk

name: Claims Severity
definition: Claims Risk

name: Combined Ratio
definition: Sum of loss ratio and expense ratio; measures underwriting profitability.

name: Distribution of in-force accounts' classification amongst different Risk Tiers
definition: These workings, titled Scoring, help us in classifying the in-force accounts of Construction & Middle-Market SBUs into different Risk Tiers, which are titled as Gold/Silver/Bronze/Referral.

name: Earned Premium Growth Rate
definition: Growth rate of earned premiums post new pricing implementation

name: Embedded Risk Exposure Index
definition: Risk Concentration

name: Embedded Value (EV)
definition: Actuarial Valuation

name: Expense Ratio
definition: Ratio of underwriting expenses to earned premium.

name: Frequency Trend
definition: Trend in claims per exposure

name: IBNR % of Ultimate
definition: Proportion of ultimate losses that are still un-reported

name: Incurred But Not Reported (IBNR) Ratio
definition: Reserving Risk

name: Lift Ratio
definition: Ratio of loss cost between top and bottom deciles of predicted risk

name: Loss Ratio
definition: Portion of earned premium used to cover losses (reported + IBNR)

name: Loss Reserve Adequacy Ratio
definition: Reserving Adequacy

name: Model Accuracy / Gini Coefficient
definition: Measures the predictive power of the pricing model against actual loss outcomes

name: Model Development Cycle Time
definition: Average time taken to develop and validate a new pricing model

name: Model Governance Compliance Rate
definition: % of models reviewed and approved as per governance standards

name: New Business Conversion Rate
definition: Measures success of pricing in converting quotes to policies

name: Operational Rate change
definition: change in expected underwriting profit as a percentage of expiring premium

name: Paid-to-Incurred Ratio
definition: Indicates claim maturity / settlement speed

name: Persistency Ratio
definition: Customer Retention

name: Portfolio Mix Change
definition: Measures shift in risk mix due to pricing or product changes

name: Post-Implementation Performance Deviation
definition: Measures deviation of actual vs. expected loss ratio post implementation
aliases: Actual vs Expected Loss Ratio Deviation

name: Premium-to-Loss Ratio (Loss Ratio)
definition: Measures profitability by comparing incurred losses to earned premiums

name: Pricing Adequacy (Indicated vs. Actual Rate)
definition: Comparison of filed or implemented rate adequacy vs. indicated rate need

name: Pricing Model Refresh Frequency
definition: Frequency of model recalibration or update

name: Rate Adequacy Deviation
definition: Measures deviation between actual and expected premium adequacy

name: Rate Change
definition: % change between Requote and Written Premium

name: Rate Change Implementation Lag
definition: Time gap between approved filing and system implementation

name: Rate Filing Approval Time
definition: Average time taken to get regulatory approval after rate filing submission

name: Regulatory Filing Success Rate
definition: % of filings approved without objections

name: Reinsurance Recovery Ratio
definition: Reinsurance Effectiveness

name: Retention %
definition: Amount of premium retained from last year business

name: Retention Rate Impact
definition: Impact of pricing changes on policy retention

name: Return on Risk-Adjusted Capital (RORAC)
definition: Risk-Adjusted Performance

name: Solvency Ratio
definition: Capital Adequacy

name: Time-to-Market (TTM)
definition: Duration from model approval to product rollout

name: Ultimate Loss Ratio
definition: Ratio of ultimate projected losses to earned premium; reflects development.

name: Value of New Business (VNB)
definition: Actuarial Profitability

name: Loss Ratio (Incurred)
definition: Ratio of incurred losses (paid + case reserves) to earned premiums.
aliases: Claims Incurred to Earned Premium Ratio

name: Loss Frequency
definition: Number of reported claims per exposure unit (policy count, insured value, etc.).

name: Loss Severity
definition: Average cost per claim (incurred or paid).

name: Pure Premium (Burn Cost)
definition: Expected loss cost per exposure unit.

name: Operating Ratio
definition: Combined ratio adjusted for investment income.

name: Loss Development Factor (LDF)
definition: Factor to project current losses to ultimate losses based on historical development.

name: Rate Change (Written Premium Change)
definition: Average change in premium rate for renewed business.

name: Retention Ratio
definition: Percentage of policies renewed from prior year.

name: New Business Ratio
definition: Portion of new business premium relative to total written premium.

name: Premium Deviation
definition: Measures deviation of policy premium from technical premium

name: Hit Ratio
definition: percentage of quotes that result in sold opportunities

name: Issued to Quote Ratio
definition: ratio of issued policies to total quotes given.

name: Issued to Submitted Ratio
definition: ratio of issued policies to total applications submitted.

name: Large Loss
definition: A large loss is a claim that breaches a certain threshold. Threshold can differ based on business area or reporting audience

name: Leads Disseminated to Lead Submitted Ratio
definition: Poportion of leads distributed to sales teams or follow-up channels copmared to total number of leads received or generated

name: Leads Disseminated to Quote Requested Ratio
definition: ratio of disseminated leads to leads that have requested an insurance quote

name: Loss Ratio
definition: Ratio of losses to the premium earned

name: Loss(Incurred/Paid)
definition: Financial impact resulting from an insured event or claim, representing the cost the insurer must pay to cover the damage, injury or liability as defined in the policy

name: IBNR (Incurred But Not Reported)
definition: Compares estimated vs. actual IBNR claims once reported.

name: Expiring Premium
definition: Total premium amount for policies that are due to expire within a specific period (e.g., month or year).

name: New Business Premium
definition: Total premium from new policies written during the reporting period (excluding renewals or migrations).

name: Renewal Premium
definition: Total premium for policies renewed within a defined period.

name: Migration Wave
definition: Volume or ratio of customers moving from one product, system, or platform to another within a specified timeframe.

name: Inforce Premium
definition: Total active premium amount from policies currently in force.

name: Proposed Premium
definition: Total premium from quotes or proposals submitted but not yet converted into policies.

name: Exposures
definition: Total number of risk units (e.g., vehicles, properties, lives) insured during a given period.

name: Deductibles
definition: Average or total deductible amounts applied to insured policies.

name: Commissions %
definition: Commissions % paid to agents or brokers for the policies written in a given period.

name: TIV (Total Insured Value)
definition: Aggregate value of all assets insured under a policy or portfolio.

name: Avg Time Spent on Report Writing
definition: Measures the average total duration an underwriter or auditor actively spends creating, editing, and finalizing a report (including rework if any).

name: Avg Account Size
definition: The average premium value per account or insured, representing the overall scale of business written

name: Deductible
definition: The amount the insured agrees to pay out-of-pocket before insurance coverage begins. Tracked to monitor average deductible levels across the portfolio

name: Quote to Bind Ratio
definition: Measures the percentage of quotes that successfully convert into bound policies

name: Limits
definition: The maximum amount of coverage provided under a policy or per risk. Tracking average or total limits helps assess exposure concentration

name: Gross Written Premium (GWP)
definition: The total premium written by the insurer before deductions for reinsurance and other adjustments.

name: Hazard Grade
definition: A classification that measures the inherent physical or environmental risk associated with a property (e.g., fire, flood, construction type, or protection level)

name: # Revisions
definition: No. of audits that required revisions after initial submission or review.

name: % of Limit Used or Remaining
definition: percentage of  policy limit that has been used or is remaining.

name: Audit Completions
definition: Total number of audits successfully completed within a defined period

name: Average Number of Quotes per Underwriter
definition: average number of insurance quotes processed by an underwriter.

name: Average Premium
definition: average premium amount per policy, for which Auditors are auditing

name: Average Premium per Underwriting FTE
definition: average premium managed per full-time equivalent underwriting employee.

name: Avg Hours per Audit
definition: Hours taken to complete an audit from assignment to closure.

name: CAY NCOR excluding Disc/ Prud Margin
definition: measures the current accident year's net combined operating ratio, excluding any discounts or prudence margins applied to the financial results. This metric reflects the underwriting performance of the insurer for the current accident year without the impact of adjustments or conservative financial practices.
aliases: Current Accident Year Net Combined Ratio

name: Claim Frequency(Net/Gross)
definition: No of Claims or Occurances per exposure unit

name: Combined Ratio
definition: measures sum of an insurer's loss ratio and expense ratio; indicating overall underwriting profitability.

name: Compliance %
definition: Percentage of audits completed in adherence to defined standards or timelines.

name: Continuance Percentage
definition: It is the proportion of policies that renewed over the total policies up for renewal (expiring)

name: Cost Per Audit
definition: average cost incurred to complete one audit

name: Expiring Premium Retention Ratio
definition: This ratio gives insight into the competitive position the insurer holds in the marketplace. It is computed as the retained premium to the total expiring premium.

name: Exposure Change
definition: Exposure is a measure of susceptibility of loss or a measure of potential risk that insurer takes on. For example; one car insured for one year is one exposure whereas one car insured for 6 months is half an exposure. An exposure change is a change in exposure for policy. It is important to differentiate exposure change with term change; rate change; and coverage change as all four contribute to price change.

name: Mix of Business
definition: distribution of different types of insurance policies in  portfolio.

name: Modality %
definition: The percentage of audits conducted as per the recommended modality (Physical or Virtual). It measures adherence to the suggested audit mode provided by the audit team. A higher percentage indicates better compliance with modality recommendations.

name: New Policy Growth Rate
definition: rate of growth in  number of new policies issued.

name: Number of Audits Completed
definition: Total count of audits successfully completed within a defined period

name: Outstanding Audits
definition: Audits that are assigned but not yet completed

name: Policies Issued
definition: total number of policies issued over a specified period.

name: Earned Premium
definition: Portion of the written premium that corresponds to the expired part of the policy period — i.e., the premium “earned” by the insurer for the coverage already provided to date.

name: Premium Volume per Underwriter
definition: Total amount of premiums (or value of insurance policies) managed or underwritten by a specific underwriter within a given period; Indicating their level of activity or productivity.

name: Price Adequacy (i.e. Sold to Technical)
definition: The actual price is at the discretion of the underwriter. The underwriter will apply schedule credits/ debits for risk characteristics not considered for in the rating algorithm and is specific to the risk. The technical price is set based on dividing the portfolio into homogeneous groups. Within these groups, however, individual risks can be very different. This is where the underwriter has the authority to set an actual price commensurate with the risk. Deviations from technical must be justifiable

name: Productivity per Underwriter
definition: measures the average output or performance of each underwriter, typically in terms of the volume of premiums written or policies underwritten within a specific period.

name: Quote Declination Ratio
definition: ratio of declined quotes to  total number of quotes.

name: Quote Generated Volume
definition: total volume of quotes generatded over a specified perio.

name: Quote Ratio
definition: percentage of quotes that result in submitted opportunities policies

name: Renewal Declination Ratio
definition: ratio of declined renewals to  total number of renewals.

name: Renewal Premium per Underwriter
definition: measures the average amount of renewal premiums managed or secured by each underwriter within a specific period. It reflects the productivity and effectiveness of underwriters in handling policy renewals.

name: Same Day Completions
definition: number or percentage of audits completed on the same day they were assigned

name: Severity
definition: Average loss per claim

name: STT (Sold to Technical)
definition: STT measures the ratio of Gross Policy Premium to Technical Premium, showing how closely actual premiums align with technical pricing.

name: Submission Volume
definition: total volume of submissions received for underwriting.

name: Time to complete the Audit
definition: Time taken to complete an audit from assignment to closure.

name: Ultimate Loss and ALAE Ratio
definition: Final value of losses incurred by the insurance  company as of the evaluation date

name: Underwriting Employees as % of Total Employees
definition: measures the proportion of employees dedicated to underwriting roles relative to the total number of employees in an organization.

name: Underwriting Spend per Year % Premium
definition: measures the annual underwriting expenditures relative to the total premiums earned during the same period.

name: Written Exposure
definition: Refers to the total amount of risk (or units of insurance) that an insurer has underwritten during a specific period, regardless of whether the coverage has started or ended within that period.

name: Earned Exposure
definition: portion of written exposure for which the insurer has already provided coverage during a specific period. It reflects the actual risk borne by the insurer.

name: Average Account Size ($)
definition: Average premium per customer or policy account.

name: Quick Decline Ratio
definition: Ratio of applications declined at the initial underwriting or screening stage.

name: Completion %
definition: Refers to how much of the required information, documentation, or process steps have been completed in the UW system

name: Actionable Inventory
definition: No of days since the exposure was open

name: Adjuster Timeliness
definition: Time in Review Days

name: Associated Cases/ Exposures
definition: Total exposures related to a provider

name: Average Assign To Close Cycle Time
definition: Applicant & Respondent: average # of days between Arb Activity Assigned Date and Arb Activity Closed Date

name: Average Claim Settlement Time
definition: Claims Efficiency

name: Average Create To Close Cycle Time
definition: Applicant & Respondent: average # of days between Arb Activity Open Date and Arb Activity Closed Date

name: Average Meds Submitted
definition: Total medical bill amount submitted

name: Claim Settlement Ratio (CSR)
definition: Claims Performance

name: Closed
definition:
Number of closed claims 

Date is Close date

name: Closed overdue
definition: A count of closed activities with cycle time (create to closed) exceeding SLA

name: Closed vs Received - SIU
definition: Ratio of investigations closed vs number or new and reopen investigations

name: Complete Days - Bill
definition: Carrier Received Date to Paid Date - if delayed and adjuster verified received date is present, delayed days excluded

name: CT : Total Loss Settle to 1st Pay
definition: No of days between first salvage creation to initial pay
aliases: Settle to First Payment Duration Days

name: Disputed Amount
definition: Total sum of disputed amount for settled or unsettled matters

name: Expense Per Exposure
definition: Total expenses paid/number of exposures open at any point in a given timeframe
aliases: Average Loss Adjustment Expense per Risk

name: Gross Return (%)
definition: Sum of Settled out of total amount

name: Hearing to Filing Ratio
definition: Number of files heard over the total applicant production. Data is pulled based on the current order of hearing cases. The number of hearings in this equation may not have happened at the same time as the applicant production but the averages of months should even out.

name: Incoming Savings%
definition: This measures the overall dollars paid out, divided by the original demand. This takes information from transaction level data or eSubro data to calculate the original demand and the actual paid amounts

name: Inventory - Aged%
definition: % of open files that are open x days since Subro Referral Date

name: Investigation Rate
definition: Numbers of exposures that were investigated including reopened

name: Legal Expense
definition: Total sum of Legal Expense for settled or unsettled matters

name: Litigation Status
definition: The phase of the litigation workflow the given matter is in

name: Matter Disputed Amount
definition: Total Disputed amount across LOBs

name: Matter New Count
definition: Count of instances of matter being created

name: Matter Reason for Litigation
definition: The primary cause for why the matter was created

name: Matter Settlement Amount
definition: Total settlement amount across LOBs

name: Monthly Incoming Inventory
definition: Inventory Snapshot as of End od Prior Month

name: Overall Litigation Loss Amount
definition: Total sum of pending or settled damnum amount for matters

name: Overdue Activities
definition:
Open Activities that have surpassed their target date by over 5 days. 
Days between Activity Target Date of Open Activity and Today's date > 5 Days

name: Paid Loss Per Exposure
definition: Paid loss amount per exposure

name: Pending Payment
definition: Bills posted and pending payment

name: Reclose rate
definition: rate of instances of a matter being closed after it has been reopened

name: Referral Rate
definition: Number of referrals sent through manual or proactive sources by number of referrals created by LOB

name: Remaining Policy Limits
definition: total amount left to be paid according to the policy limit

name: Reopen Rate
definition: Count of reopen claims within few days of initial claim closure as a % of closed claims.

name: Reserve Accuracy
definition:
At the exposure level, compares the reserve to the total paid at the time the claim is 1st closed. Excludes Subro recoveries
If initial reserve is +/- 10% of total paid at 1st closure, the initial reserve is considered accurate. If the initial reserve is $2, or $3 and total paid is zero, initial reserve is considered accurate.

name: Reserve Cycle Time
definition: Average calendar days from report date to initial reserve

name: Resolution Rate
definition: Rate at which matters are resolved

name: Settled%
definition: The % of settled files out of all closed Subrogation files within a defined period.

name: SIU Acceptance Rate
definition: No of exposures accepted by SIU for investigations

name: Subro Closed without recovery 30 (%)
definition: Percentage of Subro referrals closed without recovery with 30 days of referral

name: Avg Paid ALAE on Closed
definition: Average allocated loss adjustment expense (like attorney fees or investigation costs) paid on all closed claims, shows the typical expense per resolved case

name: #Active Arbitrations
definition: This is the total count of unique applicant case plus the total count of unique respondent cases.

name: % Awarded on win
definition: This shows, for all applicant arbitration files where files has the Win-Ind='Y', the awarded $/Total Damages Requested.

name: % Recovered on Settled
definition: Total Recovered $/Total Paid $ (less salvage & other Recoveries) to date for settled files closed within a defined period.

name: % Replacement Cost Change  (YTD)
definition: % change in RCV amount from initial estimate RCV to final revision RCV

name: Active Inventory
definition: Loss that is currently in the process of being investigated and managed

name: Activity Level Inventory
definition: # of Received Activities where adjuster is activity owner

name: Adherence
definition: Overall system adherence

name: Auto Network Shop Referal %
definition: Appraisal Channelling distribution for GRN

name: Avail to Plan
definition: Calculated by looking at planned availability the week prior and comparing it to what actually happened during current week

name: Availability
definition: Calculating availability of IC to receive claims

name: Avg. Days to Release
definition: Days between initial predicted total loss date and the pick up cleared date

name: Avg. Rental Days
definition: Average Rental days for vehicles

name: Behavioural Aggregate
definition: Percentage of questions that meet the expectations based on survey return date

name: Bill Allowed Count Per Exposure
definition: Total billed allowed count per exposure after applying reductions

name: Bill Allowed Per Exposure
definition: Billed amount per exposure after applying reductions

name: Bill Charged Count per Exposure
definition: Count of bills charged per exposure

name: Bill Charged per Exposure
definition: Bills charged amount per exposure

name: Claim Level Inventory
definition: Number of Open Claims where adjuster is the Claim Owner

name: Claim opt In
definition: Checks if claims has opted in for a SMS service

name: Claim Owner Received
definition: No of received claims where adjuster is the first assigned claim owner. Date is first claims owner assigned date

name: Clearly Explained, Informed, Responsiveness
definition:
Behavioural Question Scores

Results are tagged to the claim owner and the most recent estimate writer at the time the survey was triggered

Range: 0 - 100

name: Closed / FTE Day
definition: # of assignments closed per work day per FTE

name: Closed Cycle Time
definition: The number of workdays between when was the SIU activity assigned to an investigator and when activity gets completed

name: Combined Offset
definition: It is defined as Application rate based on the average adjustment on the claim

name: Comparative Negligence (Comp. Neg.) Application Rate
definition: % of exposures associated with partial insured liability decision

name: Complaints
definition: Complaint Volume

name: Completed
definition: Claims completed per day in Service Power. This number should match what you see looking back in an adjuster Gantt for a given day/week/etc.

name: CT : Report to Appraisal Assign
definition: Average number of days between exposure assign date and initial assignment date

name: Current Incoming Inventory
definition: Inventory Snapshot as of Prior Day

name: Current Open Count
definition: Count of current open activities

name: Cycle Time
definition: Average time difference between two activities

name: Cycle Time (Report-1st Pay)
definition: Average number of days between Report and the date that 1st payment is made

name: EOM Open Inventory
definition: EOM open inventory counts i.e., counts of open inventory by last day of month

name: Escalations
definition: Presidential Service Team (PST) Personal Lines Agent Escalation volume

name: Exposure opt In
definition: % exposures eligible for SMS that are sent a non-system outbound SMS to customer

name: External Transfer %
definition: % of claims transferred out of the Job type to a different Job type

name: Financial Headcount
definition: Staffing/ Billed FTEs in each dept

name: Glass & Tow Caseload
definition: Count of received activities with a list of subject names

name: Gross Return Compared to Industry (%)
definition: Final amount compared to Industry standards

name: IA% (Independent Agents)
definition: Appraisal Channelling distribution for IA

name: incoming Cycle Time
definition: The number of days between when a PDL Subrogation activity or Damage Review (NAV) is opened to date of closure

name: Internal Transfer %
definition: % of claims transferred to another IC within the Job type

name: Inventory - Days Open
definition: Days between Subro Referral Date and Current Date (Calculated like cycle time, but with open files)

name: Labor Hours Per Rental Day
definition: Total number of labor hours per day

name: Litigation Status Final Date
definition: The date on which the matter status was transitioned from making the status completed

name: Litigation Status Initial Date
definition: The date on which the matter status was entered

name: Manual Referral Acceptance Rate
definition: % of claims manually referred to SIU that are accepted by SIU

name: Manual Referrals
definition: Number of claims manually referred to SIU by an IC

name: Matter Close Date
definition: Date on which the matter was closed

name: Matter Creation Date
definition: Date on which the matter was created in navigator

name: Matter Current Open Count
definition: Count of matter currently in Open state

name: Matter Current Open Non-Assigned Count
definition: Count of open matters which are currently not assigned

name: Matter Cycle Time : Created to First Close
definition: Number of days between Matter creation to first close date

name: Matter Disputed Volume
definition: Count of disputed matters across LOBs

name: Matter First Close Count
definition: Count of instances of a matter being closed for the first time

name: Matter legal Expense Amount
definition: Total Legal expense amount across LOBs

name: Matter month end open count
definition: Count of matters open at the given end-of-month date

name: Matter Reopen Date
definition: The date on which the matter was reopened

name: Matter Settlement Date
definition: Date on which the matter is marked settled

name: Matter Strategy
definition: Overarching strategy used to resolve the matter

name: Month End Open Count
definition: Total open activity inventory at the end of the month

name: Open Activities
definition: Count of activities that are currently open [do not have a close date]

name: Open overdue
definition: A count of open activities with cycle time (create to yesterday) exceeding SLA

name: Overflow
definition:
The reason a claim did not get assigned to an adjuster in Service power. 

Overflow Reasons
• De-allocated because the job overlapped a standard activity after an API call. This column is always NULL if the job is resourced (i.e. not unallocated).---API calls indicate something changed between Service Empowerment/Service Gantt/ServiceScheduler. Causes the schedule to longer fit  (could be a new std. activity)
• De-allocated because the job spanned an operative day boundary after an API call.---API calls indicate something changed between ServiceEmpowerment/ServiceGantt/ServiceScheduler. Causes the schedule to longer fit  (could be a new std. activity)
• De-allocated because the job spanned postings after an API call.---API calls indicate something changed between ServiceEmpowerment/ServiceGantt/ServiceScheduler. Causes the schedule to longer fit  (could be a new std. activity)
• De-allocated because the job spanned shift pattern assignments after an API call.---API calls indicate something changed between ServiceEmpowerment/ServiceGantt/ServiceScheduler. Causes the schedule to longer fit  (could be a new std. activity)
• De-allocated by the optimizer.---Deallocated by SP
• Forced:  mandatory operative has no local knowledge.---Adjuster has no local knowledge
• Forced: mandatory operative doesn’t have skills.---Adjuster has no SP skills set to handle claim. Typically happens when an adjuster’s skills are changed.  The claim allocates to an adjuster (or is forced) but then a skill change causes it to deallocate.
• Forced: mandatory operative is not working.---Adjuster is unavailable. Claim gets made mandatory/confirmed but then the adjuster ends up on FTO/unavailable.
• Forced: no operative has local knowledge.---Claim is outside local knowledge rings
• Forced: no operative has time available.---No one is available to handle claim
• Forced: no operative is working.---There is someone who has local knowledge for the claim, but are not working on the day claim was trying to optimize on calendar
• Forced: no time available within access hours.---Schedule is full and cannot fit another claim
• Manually de-allocated.---Deallocated by manager or FRM
• Replaced by a more important job. Replaced by a more important job. This happens when a claim gets confirmed in a slot a tentative claim is scheduled.  Or a mandatory claims displaced

name: PL Paid Losses
definition:
Paid losses by LOB
This metric is highly summarized monthly at LOB and Brand level

name: Potential Restitution
definition: Potential Recoverable amount from medical providers

name: Productive Utilization
definition: Productivity Eligible Work divided by Capacity, with a yearend benchmark of 100%

name: Productivity
definition: Number of tasks completed by the Claims Assistant(s)

name: Recorded Statements
definition: The frequency at which recorded statement is taken for applicable Property Damage Liability and Comprehensive exposures

name: Regulatory Late
definition: Regulatory Timeliness = N

name: Regulatory Timeliness
definition: State Level Reg Requirements (30 day/45 day/60 day states) - completed days above - delayed queues excluded ( when adjuster verified received data is populated)

name: Rental Gap to Industry
definition: No of rental days in comparison to Industry standards

name: Reopen
definition:
Number of reopened claims where adjuster is the Claim Owner at reopen; includes all reopens

Date is Reopen date

name: Report-to-Coverage Decision (Days)
definition: Days since exposure was opened with incomplete coverage decision

name: Report-to-Liability Complete (Days)
definition: Days since exposure was opened with incomplete liability decision

name: Re-Supplement Activities
definition: # of duplicate "process supplement activities"

name: Retained
definition: Claims retained per day as assigned in Navigator

name: Scheduled
definition: Claims scheduled per day in Service Power (will not exactly match retained due to scheduling delays within SP)

name: Secondary Decline Investigations
definition: Number of times at the exposure level, a completed accepted manual or Proactive triage is declined by the investigator

name: Segment Owner Received
definition:
Number of retained claims where adjuster is the Claim Owner at first closure

Date is 1st Claim Owner Assigned date (NAV)

name: Settled Count
definition: The number of closed files with the subrogation status description "settled" within the defined period . YTD measures the average Settled Count per month.

name: Settlement Amount
definition: Sum of settled amount for settled matters

name: SIU Accepted
definition: Number of manually referred claims accepted by SIU

name: SIU Referral Rate
definition: No of exposures referred to SIU for investigations

name: SRF% (Subro referral follow up)
definition: Subro referral follow-up

name: Status Complete Time
definition: Number of days between Litigation Status Final Date to Litigation Status Initial Date

name: Subro Closed without recovery 15 (%)
definition: Percentage of Subro referrals closed without recovery with 15 days of referral

name: Total Closed
definition: Count of arb activities closed within each month  (tied to Activity Closed Date]

name: Total Recovery Amount
definition:
The Finance Department receives refund checks from a variety of sources including third - party (3PCs), third parties, attorneys, and vendors. Finance deposits the refunds and posts them to the claims system.
The DTR is generated daily to  summarize these financial transactions.

name: Total Utilization
definition: All Retained Assignments divided by Capacity, with a yearend benchmark of 100%

name: Units Allowed Per Exposure
definition: Number of procedural units on which insurer made payments after applying reductions on an exposure

name: Units Charged Per Exposure
definition: Number of procedural units charged by medical provider on the bills on an exposure

name: Upcoming Activities Due
definition:
Open Activities due in the next three weeks.
Activity Target Date of Open Activity is between Today and the next 3 full weeks.

name: Usage
definition: All retained assignments divided by capacity that is adjusted for not working on claims during a week

name: Weekly Incoming Inventory
definition: Inventory Snapshot as of End od Prior Week

name: Work Assist - Potential Missed Opps
definition: Number of RD(Recoverable Depreciation), ALE (Additional Living Expense), and Contents Pricing tasks that were not sent to Work Assist. These are potential instances and there may be valid reasons to not utilize Work Assist.

name: Work Assist Opportunities
definition: Number of tasks sent over by the adjuster(s)
